purpose: selected OpenAI source images ready for separate Meshy image-to-3D submissions
visual_target: M4 Sherman hard-surface, non-toy, separate animatable part kit for phone-budget Three.js runtime
next_spend_scope: submit selected hull as separate Meshy asset
submit selected turret as separate Meshy asset
submit selected mantlet_barrel as separate Meshy asset
submit selected gear_wheel as separate Meshy asset

hull.label: Hull Upper B
hull.verdict: usable upper hull shell; no visible wheels, tracks, sprockets, bogies, or turret

turret.label: Turret Shell C
turret.verdict: usable separate turret shell with no long barrel and no hull

mantlet_barrel.label: Mantlet / Barrel
mantlet_barrel.verdict: usable isolated gun and mantlet source

material_tiles.label: Material Tiles B
material_tiles.verdict: usable style reference; contains clean material tiles without text labels

assembly_plan.hull: static chassis root; receives authored tread ribbons and generated wheel modules as children
assembly_plan.turret: separate yaw pivot child on hull turret ring
assembly_plan.mantlet_barrel: separate pitch pivot child on turret mantlet socket
assembly_plan.gear_wheel: instanced/duplicated roadwheel-sprocket visual module; rotate as kitbash part where useful
assembly_plan.tread_ribbon: only hand-authored mesh; animate in texture space on phone runtime

reject_later_if_meshy_output: hull output grows tracks, wheels, turret, barrel, or complete running gear
turret output grows hull, wheels, tracks, or long barrel
mantlet_barrel output grows turret body or hull
gear_wheel output grows a full belt or chassis
any output reads as soft pillow, primitive blockout, toy, or high-poly sculpt unusable on phone
